title: Failed to schedule appointment or provide alternatives
evidence: human_agent: I'm sorry, but I can't refer you to other clinics.
should_have: The agent should have either scheduled the appointment for a routine check-up if possible or provided information on where to find such services.

title: Ignored patient's request for a general check-up
evidence: patient_bot: Can you recommend where I might be able to schedule a general check-up?
should_have: The agent should have acknowledged the patient's request for a general check-up and attempted to provide relevant information or alternatives.

title: Repeated focus on orthopedic services despite patient clarification
evidence: human_agent: Pivot Point Orthopedics focuses on joint muscle and bone care. We don't offer General routine check-ups or Primary Care visits.
should_have: The agent should have recognized the patient's clarification about needing a general check-up and adjusted the conversation accordingly.
